class.name: UserLoginWebPage
class.brief_description: A web page that asks for [User] credentials and logs them in by setting cookies.

link.title: Website with users using the SQLite db backend
Website with users using the SQLite db backend, with bootstrap
Website with users using the SQLite db backend, with bootstrap, templated

signal.name: user_logged_in
signal.description: Emitted when a [User] logged in successfully.
